title: selaginella revoluta
intro: Selaginella revoluta, also known as Spiny Club Fern, is a species of spore-producing plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Selaginella revoluta include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and processed into teas, infusions, or capsules, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
